title: psephellus manakyanii
intro: Psephellus manakyanii, also known as Manakyani's dandelion or Armenian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Psephellus manakyanii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
